subject: [PATCH v1 6/9] fuse: support buffer copying for kernel addresses

2026-03-24.patch_summary: This patch adds support for buffer copying in the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) kernel module, specifically allowing it to work directly on kernel addresses rather than requiring page extraction and kmapping. This is a preparatory step for supporting kernel-managed ring buffers in fuse-over-io-uring. The change involves modifying several functions within the FUSE codebase to handle both user-space and kernel-space buffer copying. The patch also includes some minor cleanups and warnings to ensure correct behavior when working with kernel addresses.
